title: Eva charactersMIIclonized
wikitext:
[]: Eva characters...MIIclonized             Quote Post by Stealth Yoshi » Thu Jul 29, 2010 9:27 pm I'm sure it has crossed your mind at least once if you're an Eva fan and own a Wii. Create "Mii" characters for the cast of Eva ...or at least your favorites. Right now, I'm in the process of creating Gendo, Shinji, Asuka, and Mari as they seem easy enough to "Miiclonize". Surely some of you have your own Eva-related Mii characters. Show them off here! Of course, some of the cast will be harder to make than others to any degree of accuracy. Due to the restrictive color pallete Nintendo gives us, Rei and Misato are screwed by default, and Kaworu can sorta come thru, but you have to give him shades or something because red isn't an option for eye color. Seriously, how hard would it have been to give us a simple RGB slider for colors, rather than just 8 colors? Anyway, I'll keep working on my first wave of characters and post them when they're done (and can get screen caps). In the mean time, I'm sure I'm not the only one who has Eva Mii characters, let's see 'em!

[]: What better reason to play the Wii than an Eva reason?             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Jul 29, 2010 9:31 pm Why the hell haven't I thought of doing this? Now I have a reason to play my Wii again!

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jul 30, 2010 12:26 am I have a Gendo and a Ritsuko.

[]:             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Fri Jul 30, 2010 12:36 am i think i've had the 3 main pilots since i got my wii, but i haven't gone to the mii channel in years.

[]:             Quote Post by Riotgear » Fri Jul 30, 2010 6:03 am Xbox 360 has Mii-esque avatars which offer a little more variety in some places, but I don't think you can do non-natural hair colors there either, which sucks. Does Playstation Home's avatar system let you have dyed hair? I made a 'Rei' Mii, but because I knew the blue hair and red eyes would be impossible I designed her after Sadamoto's old 'Yui Ichijou' concept design. She was deleted in a mass cleanup I did a while back though. Maybe I should try recreating her on 360.

[]: ALL console avatars, might as well!             Quote Post by Stealth Yoshi » Fri Jul 30, 2010 5:21 pm If you have avatars of Eva characters made on other consoles, feel free to post screens of them here as well as your Miis. I don't want to make this sound like a Wii-only thing. As for me, I'm pretty much finished with the basic creation of my Gendo, Shinji, Mari, and Asuka. Just need a little fine-tuning. Then the million-dollar challenge is to steal the Wii away from the NETFLIX users here and hook it up to the Dazzle on the PC so I can get some screens...or get my old digital camera to take decent ones. Touji, Kensuke, Hikari, Fuyutsuki, and the bridge gang should be easy enough to make as well, hmm. ...and Ritsuko, thanks NAveryW, forgot about her for a sec. LOL Kaji and Keel would be funny too. Gendo is a riot, I'm gonna go piss people off with him online in Mario Kart Wii.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sun Aug 01, 2010 5:18 pm I have Shinji on Guitar Hero World Tour. I would have Eva characters on Soul Calibur 4, but I've used up all the slots. You could possibly make Miis for the following: Rei with white hair Misato with black hair Not sure about Kaji, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Stealth Yoshi » Wed Aug 04, 2010 8:20 pm Finally finished and capped my first four. Mari not to scale, sorry lol. Not the best hair for Asuka, but none of them really were. Lesser of several evils I guess. Questions, comments, suggestions? Anyone else have some caps of their own? Gendo reminds me of how he looked in Eva @ School. Time for me to work on a Fuyutsuki to stand motionless next to him everywhere while he rides in his deskmobile. I'll try Rei and Misato the way you mentioned DonutKing, good idea.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Wed Aug 04, 2010 9:03 pm Stealth Yoshi, that Gendo Mii is very much like the Eva@school cgi Gendo. I like Mii Shinji's eyebrows; gives him a sort of 'Target in the Center. Pull the switch.' expression. Also, Mari's hair could probably work well for a Hikari mii.
